title: Implement User Auth UI
description: Create the frontend views and components for user registration and login. This includes creating forms, managing component state, and communicating with the backend authentication API.
ai_instructions: Create a 'RegistrationView' and a 'LoginView'. Use a state management solution (like React Context or Zustand) to handle the user's authentication status globally. API calls should be centralized in a service module (e.g., 'src/services/authService.ts').
execution_steps: Create Registration and Login view components under 'src/views/'.
Create reusable form and input components under 'src/components/'.
Create an 'authService.ts' to handle API calls to the '/register' and '/login' endpoints.
Implement a global auth context to store the user's token and status.
Wire up the components, state, and services.
Implement routing for the login/registration pages.
definition_of_done: A user can successfully register through the UI.
A user can successfully log in through the UI.
The application state correctly reflects the user's authenticated status after login/logout.
Error messages from the API are displayed to the user.
